channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: White House and China Issue Diverging Statements After Trump-Xi Meeting
item.description: Following a bilateral meeting between U.S. President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping at the APEC summit in Busan, the White House released a statement highlighting key discussions, inclu...

item.title: FA Cup Final 2026: Chelsea vs Manchester City Amid Controversy and Modern Football Realities
item.description: The 2026 FA Cup final between Chelsea and Manchester City reflects the complexities and contradictions of modern football. Chelsea’s Calum McFarlane, a novice manager, stands a chance of winning the c...

item.title: Delta Goodrem secures Australia's spot in Eurovision 2026 final
item.description: Delta Goodrem has successfully guided Australia into the finals of the 70th Eurovision Song Contest held in Vienna, Austria, marking the country's first appearance in the final for three years. Perfor...

item.title: Muhimbili National Hospital successfully performs minimally invasive kidney transplants on four patients
item.description: Muhimbili National Hospital in Dar es Salaam has reached a major milestone in Tanzania’s healthcare by successfully performing kidney transplants on four patients using minimally invasive keyhole surg...

item.title: Elsbeth Juda and Her Impact on Post-War British Fashion Photography
item.description: Elsbeth Juda (1911–2014), professionally known as “Jay,” was a pioneering British fashion photographer whose innovative vision helped redefine post-war British style. Serving as associate editor and s...

item.title: How Financial Advisors Can Support Aging Clients Experiencing Cognitive Changes
item.description: Financial advisors are increasingly encountering the delicate issue of cognitive decline in their aging clients. Neela White, a senior portfolio manager at Raymond James Ltd., emphasizes the importanc...

item.title: US Company Tests Drones for School Safety Measures Against Shooters
item.description: A US startup, Campus Guardian Angel, is piloting an innovative approach to tackle the serious issue of school shootings. Instead of using lethal weapons, the company has developed small, two-pound dro...

item.title: George Ruto Visits Nairobi CBD, Encourages Youth Support for President's Re-election
item.description: On the night of May 15, 2026, George Ruto made an unplanned visit to the Nairobi city centre, engaging directly with the public during the late hours. Speaking to citizens, he stressed the importance ...

item.title: Japan may export surface-to-ship missiles to the Philippines amid regional security concerns
item.description: Japan's Defense Ministry is reportedly considering the export of surface-to-ship missiles to the Philippines as part of its evolving role in regional security, according to NHK. Last month, Japan sign...

item.title: Toyota breaks Hilux gathering record with 1,545 vehicles at Nampo
item.description: Toyota South Africa has set a new milestone for the largest gathering of Hilux vehicles, with 1,545 units assembled at the 2026 Nampo Harvest Day in Bothaville, surpassing the previous record of 1,440...

item.title: Four perish in small medical plane crash in Capitan Mountains, New Mexico
item.description: A small medical plane crashed in the Capitan Mountains near Ruidoso, New Mexico, killing all four people on board, who were flight crew and medical personnel. The plane had departed from Roswell Air C...

item.title: Government shifts focus to easing cost-of-living for Nigerians
item.description: Nigeria government don decide to slow down the wahala economic reforms wey dey pain people and instead dem wan focus on how dem fit reduce cost of living for ordinary Nigerians. Finance Minister, Taiw...

item.title: Arc Raiders 2026: Planned Updates and Key Changes
item.description: Since its launch, Arc Raiders has rapidly become one of the standout multiplayer games of 2026, enjoying two remarkable months of popularity. Embark Studios has announced that the game will shift its ...

item.title: Eric Clapton's Musical Journey and Style in the 1960s
item.description: During the 1960s, Eric Clapton emerged from being a local art student to an international guitar legend, shaping the sound of British blues and psychedelic rock. His early career included joining the ...

item.title: Sgt Fannie Nkosi charged with tampering and obstruction in Limpopo
item.description: Sgt Fannie Nkosi, previously arrested following his appearance at the Madlanga commission of inquiry, is now facing additional charges. According to National Police spokesperson Brig Athlenda Mathe, N...

item.title: Columnists Analyze the Final California Gubernatorial Debate and Candidate Performance
item.description: The final debate among California's leading gubernatorial candidates, held in San Francisco, offered little to shift the dynamics of the race. Columnists Gustavo Arellano, Mark Z. Barabak, and Anita C...

item.title: Tanzania advances plan to expand national water supply network
item.description: Tanzania is making good progress on its national water grid plan, which aims to improve water distribution across the country. The government is pushing forward initiatives to connect more regions to ...

item.title: EPRA Announces Petrol and Diesel Price Increases in May-June 2026
item.description: In its latest monthly review, the Energy and Petroleum Regulatory Authority (EPRA) announced that petrol and diesel prices in Kenya will increase, effective May 15, 2026. Super petrol will go up by Sh...

item.title: Conservative Critique Labels House Speaker Mike Johnson as Too Submissive to White House
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson, a Republican from Louisiana, has been sharply criticized by conservative commentator Joe Perticone in The Bulwark. Perticone's article argues that Johnson’s tenure as Speak...

item.title: APC to Hold Direct Primaries Amid Internal Party Tensions
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) don decide to hold direct primaries for the House of Representatives elections as resistance dey rise from party members wey no gree for consensus method. This na a...
